fields.label: Landing Title
fields.description: Heading shown at the top of the landing page.

fields.label: Greeting (optional)
fields.description: Default welcome line. A layout can override this for its users.

fields.label: App Default Landing
fields.options:
Standard Desk
Nest Home
CRM Mobile
My Activities
fields.description: Where users with NO matching layout land. Leave on 'Standard Desk' so only people with a layout are sent to Nest Home.

fields.label: Allow users to override their landing page
Brand Logo
fields.description: Used if set; otherwise nest_theme's customer logo is used.

fields.options: Which lists and buttons each role sees is configured under Nest Home Layout (one entry per role or role profile). A user is sent to Nest Home only when a layout matches them.
